# ADC Vendors & Partners

Spec sheets, proposals, correspondence, and technical documentation for ADC's vendor ecosystem.

## Partners

| Vendor | Role | Status | Folder |
|--------|------|--------|--------|
| **First Solar** | Layer 1 Power — Solar panels (Series 7 CdTe) | IN THE DOOR | `first-solar/` |
| **NVIDIA** | GPU compute, DSX reference design, certification | PRIMARY | (strategy in memory/) |
| **Siemens** | Omnivise — grid/generation control | CONTACT MADE | TBD |
| **Eaton** | Power distribution | CONTACT MADE | TBD |

## Folder Structure
```
vendors/
  <vendor-name>/
    README.md              — Company overview, contacts, relationship status
    spec-sheets/           — Product datasheets, technical specs
    proposals/             — Quotes, project proposals, site surveys
    correspondence/        — Emails, meeting notes, agreements
```

## Adding a New Vendor
1. Create folder: `vendors/<vendor-name>/`
2. Add README.md with company info and relationship status
3. Create subfolders: spec-sheets/, proposals/, correspondence/
4. Drop docs in the right subfolder
